sys_ui_page.description:
UI Page to prompt from Platform about cancellation of Tasks and subtasks; renamed cancel_prompt to cancel_task_prompt 2.8.0 | 2022-08-14 | raj | STRY0125927 - All Mark Complete modals- Add info message "Marking complete will delete Draft Tasks"
v2.7 2.7.0 | 2021-09-22 | mmcc | STRY0108861 - DIA- Cancel from Top Task Notification renamed cancel_prompt to cancel_task_prompt; total rewrite 2.7.0 | 2021-10-8 | mmcc | STRY0109110 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal- Add Descendant tasks count Using TaskerHelpers().getDescendantsCount() 2.7.0 | 2021-10-18 | mmcc | STRY0108860 - DIA- Completed from Top Task Notification Made params.countType test for 'EXCLUDE_CLOSE'; do not count Completed, Closed Incomplete and Cancelled tasks
2.5.3 - 325 - corrected spelling error on the cancellation reason field when writing to Task field from page
sys_ui_page.html:
var styleSheets = []; styleSheets.push("tasker-modal-prompt-UIPages.css"); var linkTags = []; for (var sheet in styleSheets) { var css = new GlideRecord("content_css"); css.addQuery("name", styleSheets[sheet]); css.query(); css.next(); linkTags.push(css.sys_id+".cssdbx?ver="+css.sys_updated_on); } Warning Tasker - Warning: You have {0} open subtasks Tasker - By cancelling this task, you will automatically cancel the subtasks as well Tasker - You have {0} draft tasks Tasker - This will automatically delete ALL draft subtasks as well Tasker - Are you sure you would like to continue? Tasker - Cancellation Reason Tasker - Type your reason here cancel Tasker - Button - Cancel Task(s) Tasker - Sets the State to Cancelled var draftCount = 0; var taskerHelpers = new TaskerHelpers(); draftCount = taskerHelpers.getDraftDescendantsCount(jelly.jvar_taskSysId); var messageOpenTasksCount = ''; var descendantsCount = 0; var draftCount = 0; var activeDescendantsCount = 0; var details = { taskSysId: jelly.jvar_taskSysId, countType: 'EXCLUDE_CLOSE' }; var taskerHelpers = new TaskerHelpers(); descendantsCount = taskerHelpers.getDescendantsCount(details); activeDescendantsCount = descendantsCount - jelly.jvar_draftCount; messDescendantsCount = gs.getMessage('Tasker - Warning: You have {0} open subtasks', [activeDescendantsCount.toString()]); var messageDraftTasksCount = ''; messageDraftTasksCount = gs.getMessage('Tasker - You have {0} draft tasks', [jelly.jvar_draftCount.toString()]);

${gs.getMessage('Warning')}!

${jvar_messageOpenTasksCount}


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - By cancelling this task, you will automatically cancel the subtasks as well')}


${jvar_messageDraftTasksCount}


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - This will automatically delete ALL draft subtasks as well')}


${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Are you sure you would like to continue?')}




${gs.getMessage('cancel')} ${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Button - Cancel Task(s)')}
sys_ui_page.name: cancel_task_prompt
